meaning: n.印欧语,印欧语系的人,雅利安人adj.雅利安语系的,印欧语系的
examples: He believed that this ancient Aryan sign brought prosperity and victory.
He tries to talk to a large Aryan brother who rejects him with the condemnation, "you're a disgrace to your skin."
After the 2nd deluge, Aryan was significantly damaged and the infrastructure required a chaotic stage of rebuilding.
The reason, Jackson said, was that Webb had been targeted by the Aryan Brotherhood.
C. when, most likely, nomadic Aryan tribes from Central Asia began entering northern India.
